update_note: Research completed May 24, 2026. Covers the AI EdTech market surge driven by 84% US high school student adoption, Khanmigo's district expansion, MagicSchool AI's 6M educator milestone, and the $4.2B VC wave into AI education in 2025.

unverified_claims.note: Estimated from market size, growth momentum, and 84% student adoption data. 'AI education', 'AI tutoring', 'AI teacher tools', and 'Khanmigo' are high-volume terms. Exact Keywords Everywhere data not obtained. [unverified — estimate]

Directional estimate based on Turnitin's market position and growth; exact AI integrity tech market sizing not obtained from a primary source. [unverified — estimate]
